import { useWallet } from '../App' export default function ConnectWallet() { const { connectWallet, walletAddress } = useWallet() const formatAddress = (addr) => { if (!addr) return '' return `${addr.slice(0, 6)}...${addr.slice(-4)}` } return (

Connect Your Wallet

Connect your Freighter wallet to mint, trade, and manage fractional NFTs on the Stellar network.

{walletAddress ? (

Connected

{formatAddress(walletAddress)}

) : ( )}

Don't have Freighter?{' '} Download here

) }
